verdict_reason: AC1/AC2 paths are covered but the 400-fallback test encodes a backend behaviour that does not exist, and the pagination-with-search path is untested

todos.issue: 'Should show No notifications found when backend rejects search with bad request' hand-builds an error with status 400, but the current backend never returns 400 for a search — the test proves the branch works without proving the branch is ever reached
todos.fix: Once the backend contract is settled, replace with a test asserting the real behaviour (200 + empty page) or keep it and add a comment naming the backend constraint it depends on

todos.issue: 'Should render search form and pass referenceNumber to findAll' asserts on raw HTML substrings ('data-testid=...', 'Filter notifications', 'Keyword or reference'), which couples the controller test to markup wording and will break on any copy change
todos.fix: Keep the findAll call assertion here and move the markup assertions to the Playwright dashboard-search spec, which already covers them

todos.issue: No test covers pagination links carrying referenceNumber end-to-end through the controller (buildPaginationLinks arg reorder), nor the empty-string referenceNumber case where parseReferenceNumber must return undefined
todos.fix: Add a multi-page search fixture asserting the next-page href contains referenceNumber, and a '/?referenceNumber=%20%20' case asserting findAll is called without the param
